problem: DSOs, multi-location dental groups, and private practices need scalable, cost-effective cloud-based practice management with no upsells or add-on software requirements
solution: Modern, secure, cloud-based all-in-one dental practice management platform for DSOs and practices of all sizes, featuring practice growth tools, patient experience features, clinical workflows, revenue cycle management, analytics, and AI integration with 2,500+ practices and enterprise-grade security
